vibe: Premium, holistic, calming, culturally rooted, grounded

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium text-[#243021]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium text-[#2C2A29]

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing philosophy (p-8 to p-16 for containers)

grid_strategy.landing: Asymmetrical 'Bento' or fluid overlapped sections for organic feel. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
grid_strategy.quiz: Minimalist centered content. Max-w-2xl mx-auto for focus.
grid_strategy.admin: Control room grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F5F0]/80 border-b border-[#E2DFD8]/50
surfaces.cards: Neumorphic/Tactile flat: bg-white shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E2DFD8]/30 rounded-2xl
surfaces.quiz_options: Soft interactive cards: bg-[#F7F5F0] hover:bg-[#EFE9E1] hover:border-[#3E533B]/30 border border-transparent rounded-xl transition-all duration-300

components.button: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5
components.inputs: rounded-xl border-[#E2DFD8] bg-[#FDFCFA] px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3E533B]/20 focus:border-[#3E533B] transition-all
components.progress_bar: h-2 rounded-full bg-[#E2DFD8] overflow-hidden. Indicator: bg-[#3E533B] transition-all duration-500
customization_instructions: Use Shadcn UI for forms, inputs, and tables, but strip away the default Vercel-look.
Ensure all inputs and interactive elements have appropriate padding (py-3 px-4).
Do NOT use HTML native date picker; use Shadcn Calendar/Popover for the DOB field.
Add data-testid attributes to all form inputs, quiz options, and buttons for automated testing.

interactions.hover: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-1) and gentle shadow increases. Color transitions should be ease-out over 300ms.
interactions.quiz_transitions: Framer motion fade and slight slide-up (y: 10 to 0, opacity 0 to 1) between questions.
interactions.focus: Clear focus rings using the brand primary color with high contrast.

hero_background.description: Calm, premium spa/clinic interior setting. Use with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F7F5F0]/90 to-[#F7F5F0]/40) so text is highly legible.

quiz_abstract_bg.description: Organic abstract shapes. Use very softly (opacity 10-15%) as a background texture behind the quiz container.

result_balance_zen.description: Stacked white zen stones. Used in the final result page to symbolize harmony and balance.

specific_page_guidelines.landing: Hero section must feel like a premium health retreat. Use the hero_background image heavily masked with the base color to ensure the serif typography shines. Avoid typical SaaS two-column layouts; opt for an asymmetrical or centered editorial look.
specific_page_guidelines.lead_capture: Make the form feel like a personal onboarding rather than a data grab. Use generous spacing between inputs. Include a privacy reassurance micro-copy.
specific_page_guidelines.quiz: Keep the screen uncluttered. The active question should be the sole focus. Use a prominent but elegant progress bar at the top.
specific_page_guidelines.results: Dynamic styling based on the dominant element (e.g., tint the background slightly with the element color). Highlight the personality description and weave the 'Book Appointment' CTA seamlessly at the end of the tips. Include clear, accessible Share buttons.
specific_page_guidelines.admin: Minimalist, high-utility table. No cards, just pure functional grid with subtle row hover states. Ensure date and element type columns are easily scannable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Apply the hex codes directly using arbitrary values (e.g., bg-[#F7F5F0]) or configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' fonts are imported from Google Fonts in index.css.
Enforce the padding and spacing scales exactly as prescribed.
Build Shadcn components by copying the raw component code and modifying the Tailwind classes to match this guide.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, quiz options, share links). Example: data-testid='quiz-start-button', data-testid='input-first-name'.
